summary: Added four role-based demo accounts to DataSeeder per the requested convention role123@gmail.com / 123456: user123 (User), seller123 (Seller), staff123 (Staff), admin123 (Admin), all seeded KYC-verified, with 10,000,000 VND wallets for user123 and seller123. Passwords are hashed via the app's ensureUser (PasswordUtil) so they authenticate correctly. Restarted the backend to run the seeder; verified all four log in via POST /api/auth/login returning correct roles (userIds 7-10) and identityVerified=true, and that user123's wallet exists with balance 10,000,000. Restarted the frontend dev server on 3000 (it had stopped again).
current_status: Backend http://localhost:8096 (DB SWP_Nhom3_App) and frontend http://localhost:3000 both running. New demo logins: user123/seller123/staff123/admin123 @gmail.com, password 123456 (all KYC-verified). Note: backend restart re-ran the seeder which resets KYC flags previously set via SQL on alice/bob/walletuser back to unverified; the new role123 accounts are now the recommended test accounts and persist across restarts.
